## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**VEND_HF_COMMENTS** -> VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR_NUMBER -> VENDOR)

**VEND_INTL_BACS** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**VEND_MSTR_ADDL** -> VENDOR_INTL (VEND_NO -> VENDOR)

**VEND_QTE_HEADER** -> BUYER_DESCRIPTOR (BUYER_CD -> BUYER_CODE); COMPANY_CURRENCY (EXCH_CURR -> ISO_CODE); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); INV_CROSS_REF (MFG_PART_NO -> MFG_PART); ROUTER_HEADER (FROM_ROUTER -> ROUTER); SALESPERSONS (SALESMAN -> ID); UM_CODES (INV_UM->CODE, PUR_UM->CODE); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR); VENDOR_RFQ_TRANS (RFQ_NUMBER -> NUM)

**VEND_QTE_LINES** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); VENDOR_RFQ_TRANS (RFQ_LINE -> LINE); VEND_QTE_HEADER (SEQ -> SEQ)

**VEND_RFQ_HF_TEXT** -> VENDOR_RFQ_TRANS (VENDOR_NUMBER -> NUM)

**VEND_RFQ_LN_TEXT** -> VENDOR_RFQ_TRANS (LINE->LINE, NUMBER->NUM)

**VEND_WEB_ADDR** -> VENDOR_INTL (VEND_ID -> VENDOR)
